narrative:
Eaton City has 5,481 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
